used_for: AI judgement input, not fixed routing
strengths_as_candidates: draft cleanup when source material is clear
limits_as_candidates: may be less suitable for high-risk evidence review
may need tighter prompts for complex staged judgement
prompt_shaping_guidance: ask for uncertainty labels when facts matter
reserve complex decomposition for a stronger candidate model when available
cost_latency_notes: treat as lower-cost or faster only when current runtime evidence supports that
refresh_policy: manual review when runtime model options or observed behavior change
